_comment: git-hygiene rules. The agent edits ONLY 'allow' (user-blessed kinds/paths, fnmatch globs matched against the full repo-relative path and the bare filename; * crosses directories). Each allow entry: {pattern, why, date}. The warn lists are the template's language-agnostic defaults — extend per repo if needed. SECURITY-SCANNER NOTE: 'secret_patterns' are filename globs used to WARN when a key-shaped file (id_rsa*, *.pem, .env, …) is about to be committed — this file detects credentials by name, it never reads or contains any; allowlist this path in scans that flag it as 'reads env/credentials'.
